name: MJ Biotech, Inc.
summary: MJ Biotech, Inc. produces and distributes medical hemp based CBD infused teas and herbs. It sells its products in wellness stores, as well as through its e-commerce Website. The company was formerly known as Michael James Enterprises, Inc. and changed its name to MJ Biotech, Inc. in April 2017. MJ Biotech, Inc. was founded in 2010 and is based in Boynton Beach, Florida.
